# comfyui_dual_clip_loader (Resource)

[Recipes]

sdxl: clip-l, clip-g
sd3: clip-l, clip-g / clip-l, t5 / clip-g, t5
flux: clip-l, t5
hidream: at least one of t5 or llama, recommended t5 and llama

newbie: gemma-3-4b-it, jina clip v2 [advanced/loaders]

## Schema

### Required

### Optional
